meta.title: Complaints | Vincor — Occlusion & Posture Diagnostics
meta.description: Discover which complaints Vincor treats: jaw pain, migraine, tinnitus, teeth grinding, nerve pain, neck complaints and more. All from the jaw-spine connection.

hero.title: Which complaints does Vincor treat?
hero.description: Many chronic complaints in the head, neck and shoulder area have a common cause: a disturbed jaw position that affects posture. Our diagnostics make this connection visible.

intro.label: Our Expertise
intro.title: The connection between jaw and body
intro.description: A disturbed occlusion (jaw position) can cause complaints that seemingly have nothing to do with the jaw — from migraine to back pain. At Vincor we bring these connections into objective view with the DIERS 4D Spinescan.

approach.label: Our Approach
approach.title: From complaint to cause
approach.description: At Vincor we treat not only the symptoms, but search for the underlying cause. With the DIERS 4D Spinescan we bring the relationship between jaw, spine and posture into objective view.
items: Measurement of the influence of jaw position on posture
Personal treatment plan based on objective data

nietGevonden.title: Your complaint is not listed?
nietGevonden.description: There are more complaints that are related to a disturbed jaw position. Feel free to contact us — we'd be happy to think along with you.

cta.title: Book your free 4D scan
cta.description: Discover in a few minutes if your complaints have a common cause — completely without obligation.
